Short description:
To call them “strays” is to forget what they’ve always been: guardians of street corners, companions at tea stalls, shadows on morning walks, a part of our shared city life.Every street has its dog. Every dog has its street. It’s time we said it out loud:

#StreetDogsNotStray.

These T-shirts carry that message — and every purchase helps Charlie’s Animal Rescue Centre (CARE) continue their work with street dogs. Because belonging isn’t adoption alone. Sometimes, it’s simply being allowed to stay home.
